calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-12-2014 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion For Entry Of Default Judgment At Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Aug-21-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Michael Raifsnider, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, TEK VAY CHAU.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) ROBERT DI FRANCO.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

Plaintiff Tek Vay Chau sworn and examinded on his own behalf.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $31,200.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $6,240.00
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $1,240.90
Total Judgment in the amount of $38,680.90
Judgment signed in open court.
